ValidationRule.description: Restricts Status transitions to: Draft->Active, Active<->Inactive, Active/Inactive->Expired.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), ISCHANGED(Status__c), NOT(OR( AND(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "Draft"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Active")), AND(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "Active"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Inactive")), AND(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "Inactive"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Active")), AND(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "Active"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Expired")), AND(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "Inactive"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Expired")) )) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Invalid status transition. Allowed: Draft->Active, Active<->Inactive, Active/Inactive->Expired.
